title: Project Microchip
desc: A social deduction survival game set in a radiation-filled, abandoned forest. Survivors must complete tasks to stay alive, while the Infected hunt them down.

title: Smile Town
desc: Pay off your debts by working part-time in the nightlife district of Smile Town! Buy items from your friend Apple Ginger's shop to get an advantage at your part-time job.

title: Backrooms: The Twisted One
desc: Backrooms: The Twisted One is a tense horror escape experience set in the classic yellow liminal halls of the Backrooms. Explore 3 levels across Normal and Hard difficulties while haunted doll entities stalk your every move. They freeze when watched, but the moment you look away, they close in. Search the maze for collectible VHS tapes, stay alert, and find your way out before the twisted ones reach you.

title: Cat in a Jam: City Secrets
